# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd policy default allow.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 0
  proxyProtocol: unknown
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-unauthenticated
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
    policy.linkerd.io/default-policy: deny
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-deny-all
  requiredAuthenticationRefs: []
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-mesh-authenticated
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
    policy.linkerd.io/scope: namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-identity
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
    policy.linkerd.io/scope: infrastructure
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-networks
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: kubelet-networks
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-linkerd-viz
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
    policy.linkerd.io/scope: observability
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: linkerd-viz-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: linkerd-viz-identity
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.linkerd-viz.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: default
  annotations:
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "false"
    config.linkerd.io/admission-webhooks: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
